name: Redis
sampleLines: 12345:M 28 Apr 2024 04:02:03.123 * Ready to accept connections tcp
12345:M 28 Apr 2024 04:02:04.456 # WARNING overcommit_memory is set to 0!
12345:C 28 Apr 2024 04:02:06.000 - DB loaded from disk: 0.123 seconds
description: Adapted from lnav src/formats/redis_log.json (BSD-2-Clause). Matches the redis-server text log header introduced in Redis 3.0: '<pid>:<role-letter> <DD Mon YYYY HH:MM:SS.fff> <level-symbol> <message>' where role is X/C/M/S/R (sentinel/cluster/master/slave/replica) and level is . (debug) / - (verbose) / * (notice) / # (warning). See redis.io 'Log Format'.
